title: Now
intro: A snapshot of what I'm up to right now.
items: Finishing my Bachelor in Data & AI at ECE Paris.
Interning as a Data Science / AI engineer at Purecontrol in Rennes, building ML pipelines on IoT time-series.
Starting an MSc Data & AI for Finance (Albert School × Mines de Paris - PSL) this September, as a work-study apprentice.
Building this portfolio, and Career Agent, a tool that drafts tailored CVs and cover letters.
Levelling up on data engineering, MLOps and the cloud (AWS Practitioner in progress).
Looking for a data engineering / AI work-study apprenticeship from September 2026, and always open to interesting collaborations.
